title: erigeron cavernensis
intro: Erigeron cavernensis, also known as the limestone daisy, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erigeron cavernensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
